ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Model
ContainedObjects.Description: -If the space station is owned by a player, but that player does not control the planet, and has no other units in this system, the space station is not enough for the purpose of being neighbors

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Model
ContainedObjects.Description: -If the space station is owned by a player, but that player does not control the planet, and has no other units in this system, the space station is not enough for the purpose of being neighbors

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Model
ContainedObjects.Description:
-Each ship moving through or out of the Rift gets +1 movement and must roll a die. Any ship that rolls a 1-3 is removed from play (not destroyed) and returned to reinforcements
-Any units being carried must be assigned to a unit with capacity before rolling, and are removed along with any units whose rolls fail
-Saar Floating Factories are considered ships for the purposes of this game effect.
-If a unit is moving out of or through a gravity rift to pick up units in another system, and that unit fails its rift roll, the units to be picked up are not moved.

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Model
ContainedObjects.Description:
-Each ship moving through or out of the Rift gets +1 movement and must roll a die. Any ship that rolls a 1-3 is removed from play (not destroyed) and returned to reinforcements
-Any units being carried must be assigned to a unit with capacity before rolling, and are removed along with any units whose rolls fail
-Saar Floating Factories are considered ships for the purposes of this game effect.
-If a unit is moving out of or through a gravity rift to pick up units in another system, and that unit fails its rift roll, the units to be picked up are not moved.

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Model
ContainedObjects.Description:
-Each ship moving through or out of the Rift gets +1 movement and must roll a die. Any ship that rolls a 1-3 is removed from play (not destroyed) and returned to reinforcements
-Any units being carried must be assigned to a unit with capacity before rolling, and are removed along with any units whose rolls fail
-Saar Floating Factories are considered ships for the purposes of this game effect.
-If a unit is moving out of or through a gravity rift to pick up units in another system, and that unit fails its rift roll, the units to be picked up are not moved.

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Model
ContainedObjects.Description:
--A player needs Antimass Deflectors in order to move into or through this system
-Each ship moving through or out of the Rift gets +1 movement and must roll a die. Any ship that rolls a 1-3 is removed from play (not destroyed) and returned to reinforcements
-Any units being carried must be assigned to a unit with capacity before rolling, and are removed along with any units whose rolls fail
-Saar Floating Factories are considered ships for the purposes of this game effect.
-If a unit is moving out of or through a gravity rift to pick up units in another system, and that unit fails its rift roll, the units to be picked up are not moved.
-If the space station is owned by a player and there are no other units in this system, the space station is not enough for the purpose of being neighbors

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Model
ContainedObjects.Description: -A player needs Antimass Deflectors in order to move into or through this system

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Model
ContainedObjects.Description:
-All unit abilities (Sustain Damage, Production, Planetary Shield, Space Cannon,  Bombardment, Deploy, and Anti-Fighter Barrage) cannot be used by or against units inside of an entropic scar. Text abilities are unaffected.
-At the start of the status phase, a player that has ships in an entropic scar can spend a token from their strategy pool to gain one of their faction-specific technologies. (This is repeatable per Scar)
-Examples of text abilities are Exo 2s suicide, or most flagships' special abilities

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Model
ContainedObjects.Description:
-All unit abilities (Sustain Damage, Production, Planetary Shield, Space Cannon,  Bombardment, Deploy, and Anti-Fighter Barrage) cannot be used by or against units inside of an entropic scar. Text abilities are unaffected.
-At the start of the status phase, a player that has ships in an entropic scar can spend a token from their strategy pool to gain one of their faction-specific technologies. (This is repeatable per Scar)
-Examples of text abilities are Exo 2s suicide, or most flagships' special abilities

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -This is an either/or. A 2R 3I planet is not worth 5.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -Units placed by this ability are still subject to fleet cap at all times.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -This also affects abilities like Benediction

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-All movement-increasing abilities (Mendosa, Grav Drive, etc) go into effect before Gravleash, and would be included in its bonus.
-Movement bonuses granted by Gravity Rifts or Crucible do not get added to Gravleash.
-Does not apply to AFB
-If a reroll mechanic is used (Munitions, Thundarian, etc), the Barony player may decide to change the ship type before the reroll.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -Nekro can NOT copy Corsair via a Valefar, but the Mentak is still considered as owning Cruiser 2, which may be copied via Technology Singularity.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-If the Alastor captures other players' units via this ability, they follow normal capture rules. If the Nekro captures their own units, they remain captured until such time that the Nekro player decides to return them to their reinforcements.
-If the Alastor gains the Firmament flagship abilities, the plots referenced are the Firmament’s own.
-If the Alastor gains the abilities of the Firmament flagship and the Obsidian comes into play, this ability is moved to the Obsidian Flagship.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -All Deploy effects are optional.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -Duplicate wormholes (of all types) count individually for this effect.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-This cannot be used on any tiles in the Fracture
-If this is used on a system containing Avernus, Avernus is also purged

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-If another player has units on Avernus and it is moved into a supernova, that player's units still move with the planet.
-If Avernus is moved out of a Gravity Rift, it does not need to roll.
-Avernus remains in play even if the Muaat player is eliminated
-Avernus may be moved out of locked systems if the other criteria are met

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-Has a fleet cost of 1 if traveling alone
-May be transported on a ship with capacity
-May be assigned to a planet as a Ground Force
-May be "raised" into space combat while on a planet in the system. It would not count against capacity or fleet pool
-May be assembled at any time
-For Articles of War interactions, visit the Rules Discussion channel to see the details

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-Sleeper tokens placed in this way may be placed at any time.
-Only one Sleeper token may be placed per planet in this way.
-The agreement must include the planet on which the Sleeper token is placed.
-The AC draw only happens during Status Phase step 3: Draw Action Cards, and does not stack with Minister of Policy.
-Coalescence may trigger the timing window for the Titans mech, and then the resulting ground forces may be placed into Coexistence

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-If the Fracture enters play via this card, the ingress tokens are placed as normal, and then 0-2 may be moved by the Cabal player. Ingress token rules must still be followed.
-Ingress tokens may not be placed or moved into the Fracture itself

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-Cards and abilities (Whens and Afters) may be played during their normal timing windows
-Only the Keleres player may use resources or TGs as votes. Planets may be exhausted as resources or influence for votes, but not both
-This is not an "agenda phase," so no effects that resolve in that timing window will be in effect (objectives, effects at the "end of this agenda phase", etc)
-Any effects that take place at the start of the next strategy phase will go into effect.
-Representative Government would not be in effect
-Faction passive abilities about voting (eg, Zeal, Galactic Threat) are still in effect
-Xxcha commander/alliance still provides an extra vote if a planet is exhausted
-If the agenda was drawn from the bottom of the deck and Quash (or similar) is used, a new agenda is drawn from the top of the deck

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -Can be triggered off combat with neutral units

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -Cannot be used at a blockaded space dock

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -The Saar player assigns the hits

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -If the Sol player exceeds fleet pool during PRODUCTION, the additional production cap on ground forces / fighters is still granted, and then after PRODUCTION, the excess ships would be rationalized

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -Ships on this card are immune to any game effects because they are not on the game board (Arms Reduction, et al)

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -Supersedes Sundered. Does not supersede Sever for movement purposes.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-Only affects movement. All other effects (neighbors, PDS 2, etc) are not affected.
-Affects all wormholes, regardless of type.
-Quantum Entanglement and Lost Star Chart do NOT supersede this effect.
-The Sever token remains in play if the Rebellion is eliminated

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -Supersedes the Rebellion ability Sundered.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -The Firmament plot action is optional. All other actions take place even if the Firmament declines to place a plot card.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -If a Secret Objective is elected that has a Firmament control token on it, the Firmament does NOT score a VP, and CANNOT score that public objective.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-All ships moving as part of this action receive immunity from SPACE CANNON.
-Only ships NOT transporting any units may move through other players' ships.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -Is only usable on Strategize / Overrule if the chosen strategy card is the same as the one in the puppeted player's area.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -Triggers before Coup

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -The Firmament player may choose when invading to go into coexistence and would avoid ground combat.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-TGs on this card are unaffected by Economic Equality, and do not count as Pillage targets or against the player's total TGs for the effects of Pillage
-The effects at the start of the status phase from the Reaping are two separate effects for the purposes of Pillage
-This does not trigger Become a Martyr.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-This card is NOT in a player's play area.
-It remains in the player's hand, but is mandatory to be played at the end of the Status Phase.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -This does not block the player who is actually controlling the planets from using them to score.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-The fleet token is gained WHEN producing, so it can "support" a newly-produced ship
-A Hacan player could exceed fleet supply during PRODUCTION in order to gain this Breakthrough, gain a fleet token from unlocking the Breakthrough, and then rationalize any excess ships down to fleet pool after PRODUCTION.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-A planet with a yellow tech specialty can be exhausted as a green prerequisite, and vice versa.
-Psychoarchaeology does not prevent a planet with a tech specialty from being exhausted by this Breakthrough.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-Any action cards on this card do not count towards your hand limit
-Cards on this card cannot be stolen, traded or forced from this card by any other game mechanics
-Cards placed onto this card are not discarded for the purpose of game effects until the Ral Nel player passes.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -If this action causes the RN player to exceed hand size limit, the give action happens before hand size limit is enforced.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -This effect resolves before Intercept can be played

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -If the last player to pass has Prove Endurance, that player scores the objective before this effect takes place.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-Only affects ground forces in adjacent systems. A planet in the same system does not qualify because a system cannot be adjacent to itself.
-If this mech pulls in another mech, that mech cannot trigger its ability.

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Tile
ContainedObjects.Description:
-These tokens may not be moved
-The extra die is mandatory

ContainedObjects.Description:
-All effects that modify BOMBARDMENT may be used with this ability.
-Present means participating in this particular ground combat on this planet.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-Do not count as planets for scoring or other game effects, but may be SPENT as planets for other game effects.
-If already in play, they cannot be moved to be placed and re-readied.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-Do not count as planets for scoring or other game effects, but may be SPENT as planets for other game effects.
-If already in play, they cannot be moved to be placed and re-readied.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card

-Do not count as planets for scoring or other game effects, but may be SPENT as planets for other game effects.
-If already in play, they cannot be moved to be placed and re-readied.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-In order for the infantry to be placed, a prerequisite MUST be skipped, not obviated by Psychoarchaeology or any other game effect that allows a player to skip prereqs.
-A zero prereq tech would not allow an infantry to be placed.
-This leader effectively cannot be used with the Nekro.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -The strategy card must be chosen before the Sabotage window opens

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -The receiving player assigns hits, and does not need to assign hits to non-fighters if fighters exist to take the hits

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -If readying a planet, it must be in an exhausted state

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-If a planet is returned to the deck via this card, any attachments on the planet are PURGED
-If a Legendary planet is returned to the deck via this card, its ability card comes readied when the planet is re-explored.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -This can be used on non-binding deals. The transaction is "resolved" when both players have fulfilled their part of the bargain.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -This takes effect before riders are determined. Only riders on the player chosen by this card will pass

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -May be played on systems containing only neutral ships

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -This card may be used on the Wormhole Nexus, and it would flip the tile if not previously discovered

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-This does not disable PLANETARY SHIELD from Arborec mechs
-This does not prevent Xxcha mechs from using their SPACE CANNON ability

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-Does not affect Skilled Retreat
-Only works on a single combat round
-The RN commander resolves before this card can be played.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -The players must agree on both planets.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -The strategy card must be chosen before the Sabotage window opens

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-This is part of Space Cannon Offense, and should be rolled with any other PDS units in range
-Place this card on your faction sheet, and hit Space Cannon. You do not need to add any units for the dock to fire.
-Maneuvering Jets can be used to cancel a hit produced by this card
-Can be used with RN Linkships. Can also be used with Linkship 2s to trigger multiple times.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -The strategy card must be chosen before the Sabotage window opens

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-You cannot combine this with start/end of turn abilities because it is not your turn.
-Cannot be affected by action canceling effects (Ceasefire, Minister of Peace, etc), since there is no turn to end.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-This does not exempt the player from fleet capacity. Any excess fleet would need to be resolved before moving on to combat.
-If the ship being moved is in a gravity rift, it must still roll for the rift.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -Is superseded by the Xxcha commander / alliance

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -This does not override the Flight ability Zeal. A Flight player may play this card, but they would still vote first.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -If Data Skimmer is in play, cards played are not discarded until the Ral Nel player passes. Only then can this card be played.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -The strategy card must be chosen before the Sabotage window opens

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-If Coup is played to cancel this strategic action, the window of "next action" remains open until the player's next turn. If, at the start of the next turn, a strategic action is not made, the consequences are the same as if Coup was not played.
-If Coup is used and a player chooses to use any of the game effects that grant a player another action, the consequences are enforced.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -You may play this at the end of your own turn

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-This card supersedes Enforced Travel Ban.
-This card supersedes the Rebellion ability Sundered.
-Does NOT supersede Sever for movement purposes.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -The strategy card must be chosen before the Sabotage window opens

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -This card may be used on the Wormhole Nexus, and it would flip the tile if not previously discovered

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-You must have cast at least 1 vote in order to use this card. The additional votes must go towards the same outcome for which you voted
-This card may be played even if the Speaker did not vote

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-If a component action is sabotaged, that player must still make another action on their turn, or pass
-This card may be played after card targets (such as units, planets, systems, cards, outcomes, or players) have been decided on, but must be played before any effects have been resolved, votes have been cast, or any dice have been rolled.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -May be used on a system where you control all planets, as long as you have a unit with BOMBARDMENT

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-May be used any time a hit is produced by you, including by PDS or abilities like Ambush, Splicer and Devotion
-Multiple Direct Hit cards may be played in a single activation on separate ships

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-May not be stacked with another Flank Speed
-If this is Sabotaged or movement is otherwise cancelled (eg, a Ceasefire), the activated system is still activated

ContainedObjects.Name: Card

-May be used any time a hit is produced by you, including by PDS or abilities like Ambush, Splicer and Devotion
-Multiple Direct Hit cards may be played in a single activation on separate ships

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -Place this card on your faction sheet before combat and the combat roller will detect it

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-This card counts for all planets in a system, and persists until the end of ground combat, including against Harrow
-Place this card on the bombarding player’s faction sheet and the combat roller will detect it

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-Is not affected by Intercept
-You may use this card to move into the Nebula

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-These rolls are unaffected by Unrelenting, Fragile, Morale Boost, or similar effects
-If successful, this cannot be blocked by Shields Holding or Sustain Damage

ContainedObjects.Name: Card

-Multiple Direct Hit cards may be played in a single activation on separate ships

ContainedObjects.Name: Card

-May not be stacked with another Flank Speed
-If this is Sabotaged or movement is otherwise cancelled (eg, a Ceasefire), the activated system is still activated

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-This card destroys UP TO 3 infantry, with zero being a valid amount
-You may choose an already-exhausted planet
-You may also choose a planet with zero infantry on it

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -You must have cast at least one vote to use this card

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -If you use this card and have no PDS or Space Docks in your reinforcements, you may choose to scuttle one from an unactivated system. You are not required to perform this action, so you may take only a PDS or only a Dock

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-May not be stacked with another Flank Speed
-If this is Sabotaged or movement is otherwise cancelled (eg, a Ceasefire), the activated system is still activated

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -May be used on a planet you own which is exhausted

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -Any units returned to space by this card may not be re-allocated to other planets in this system

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: -You may use this card to ready a planet even if your opponent has no readied planets, but you must exhaust a planet if one is in a readied state

-May not be used on PDS hits

ContainedObjects.Description: -In base game only, if you repeal a law that grants a VP, that VP is not lost by that player

ContainedObjects.Name: Card

-Only works with promissory notes that are required to be played face-up in your play area, like Alliances or Supports for the Throne
-Does not work for promissory notes like Ceasefire which remain in your hand until used.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-Does not work if you coexist on the planet and then stop coexisting. You must control the planet and lose control of it.
-Triggered by the Silver Flame.
-NOT triggered by The Sowing / Reaping.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-Losing your home system in this manner counts as a trigger condition for Become a Martyr.
-This does not affect the ability Nomadic.
-The Fracture is put into play regardless of outcome.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-Unknown relics count as their own type
-Only spends AS IF it were a planet. All other abilities affecting planets (Maw, Uprising, etc) cannot target this card

ContainedObjects.Description: -Interacts as normal with any abilities or leaders that affect AFB

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description: - Action cards removed from the discard pile are public knowledge; please place them face up on the table next to The Codex.  Once other players have had an opportunity to view the cards draw them to your hand.

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-Any game piece that has an exhausted and readied state can be chosen: leaders, planets, techs, etc
-The game piece must be in an exhausted state for this to be a vaild action

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-Any action cards on this card do not count towards your hand limit
-Cards on this card cannot be stolen, traded or forced from this card by any other game mechanics

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.Description:
-When using this ability, you can combine it with any other effects that say "after you take an action," like Minister of War or Master Plan.
-You cannot use a Fleet Logistics action after using this ability
-This ability works even if another player forcibly ends your term by another game effect.
